revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass import of programmatically generated pages to give attribution and fill redlinks
revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>" to "<includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "<includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly>" to "[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]"

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting
revision.text: <noinclude></noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: better alphabetize templates in category.
1 revision imported: overwriting
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template | {{Ombox | type = style | image = [[File:Ambox warning yellow.svg|40x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = '''This template is a customized [[Wikipedia:Wrapper templates|wrapper]] for {{tl|Infobox person}}'''. Any field from {{tld|Infobox person}} can work{{#if:{{{wrapped|}}}|| so long as it is added to this template first}}. It will also emit the same [[hCard]] and [[Geo (microformat)|Geo]] [[microformat]]s as {{tld|Infobox person}}. Questions? Just ask [[Template talk:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|here]] or over at [[Template talk:Infobox person]]. }}<!-- -->{{#if:{{{main|}}} | {{Ombox |text=This infobox wraps the [[Template:{{{main}}}|{{{main}}} template]]. See [[Template:{{{main}}}/doc]] for additional documentation.}} }}<!-- --><includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}} |}}</includeonly><!-- -->}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates calling Infobox person|{{Remove first word|{{PAGENAME}}}}]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
1 revision imported: overwriting to fix error
better alphabetize templates in category.
1 revision imported: en
